rationale: The two ensures-foralls over `page_array@[i]` have disjoint triggers (one per run), so I re-assert them and then prove pointwise equality of `post1_self_.page_array@[i]` and `post2_self_.page_array@[i]` by case-splitting on `i == index`: at `index` every Page field is pinned by an unconditional ensures (struct `=~=` closes it), and elsewhere both foralls fire on the same `i` giving transitivity through `pre_self_`. A final `=~=` on the views invokes sequence extensionality, which (together with the other field equalities already in the ensures) discharges `det_set_owning_container_equal`.
